Uses of Package
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun

Packages that use org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun
Package
Description
org.kink_lang.kink
The core package of the Kink vm.
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun
Interfaces used to make a host fun, which is a FunVal to perform action in Java code.
org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun.graph
Provides the Execution Graph DSL, which is a convenient way to invoke Kink funs from Java actions or handlers.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.callstack
Call stacks used in the evaluator.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.tempval
Temporary vals used by generated code.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.mod.random
The internal classes for mods under kink/random.
  • Classes in org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun used by org.kink_lang.kink
    Class
    Description
    HostFunAction
    Action of a host fun.
    HostFunBuilder
    An immutable buildre of host funs.
    HostResult
    Result of a host call.
  • Classes in org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun used by org.kink_lang.kink.hostfun
    Class
    Description
    CallContext
    Context of a call of a host fun.
    CallFlowToArgs
    Call flow step to bind args.
    CallFlowToOn
    Call flow step to bind a return val handler.
    CallFlowToRecv
    Call flow step to bind a recv.
    HostContext
    Context of an action of a host fun.
    HostFunAction
    Action of a host fun.
    HostFunBuilder
    An immutable buildre of host funs.
    HostFunReaction
    The reaction of a host fun on the result of invocation.
    HostResult
    Result of a host call.
